_metadata.description: Optimized parameter grid for step1_finetune_latent_pipeline_All_split.py. Total combinations = 96 (finetune 8 × classifier 12 × model 1).
design_rationale: ftlr: 0.001 (baseline) vs 0.0003 (finer lr, common sweet-spot for AdamW on small heads)
scheduler_flag: cosine annealing on/off — affects convergence speed
loss_type: focal vs bce — important for imbalanced drug response labels
hidden_dims: 3 architectures span shallow [64], medium [256,128], and deep [512,256,128]
dropout_rate: 0.2 (light regularisation) vs 0.4 (heavier, prevent overfit on small datasets)
activation: relu vs leaky_relu — leaky_relu can help with dying-ReLU in deep classifiers
use_batch_norm: fixed True — empirically superior for drug-response tasks
gin_type: fixed dapl — run a separate gin_type comparison grid (params_gin_compare.json) after finding best classifier arch
